ext_weather.name: Today
ext_weather.detailedForecast: Patchy fog before 10am. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 66. South wind 5 to 10 mph. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

state.message: We are Open and will be here from 12 to 5PM, we will also be open tomorrow night, Monday from 7 - 10PM. Check us out on Facebook.
state.blogUpdate: Blog post: Maker's Day done, we prepare for VCF East next Sun Mar 16 10:57:16 AM EST 2026
